cases.name: explain event loop
cases.prompt: Write a 3-paragraph explanation in explain.md of how the Node.js event loop processes timers, I/O callbacks, and microtasks. Include one concrete example.

dimensions.name: clarity
dimensions.description: Is the writing clear and well-structured?

dimensions.name: completeness
dimensions.description: Does it cover timers, I/O, and microtasks with an example?
